titleStmt.title: SII 24.239: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 239. (A.R. No. 41 of 1936-37.) EAST WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA, IN CONTINUATION OF No. 222 ABOVE.

summary.p: Records a tax-free gift of lands in Toḍaiyūr, Naṭṭaṇaṅguḍi, Maḻavaṉūr and several other villages to the bhaṭṭas of Ravivarma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and the god Ravinārāyaṇaperumāḷ (vide No. 222) by the king Tribhuvanachakravartin Kōnerinmaikoṇḍāṉ (vide No. 240 following) while he was camping at Kaṇṇaṉūr on the 24th day of his 2+1st regnal year. Since the village was formed in the year opposite to the eighth year of Perumāḷ Sundarapāṇḍya identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya III (No. 222 above) the king of this record may be identified with Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśēkhara II.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This inscription is engraved in continuation of No. 240 this is partly covered by a ditch.
div.p:
yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu kaṇṇaṉūril Eḻuntaruḷiyirukka nāḷ 2 10 4- l tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppatiyil tirunāmattāl vaitta Akaram Iravivarmmaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukkum tirunāmattāl Eḻuntaruḷivitta nāyaṉār Iravinārāyaṇap perumāḷukkum palavṛttimāṉkaḷu
ppil kaḻintapaṭikku terippu bhaṭṭarkaḷ per 100 9kku paṅku 109 nāyaṉār Iravinārāyaṇapperumāḷukkup paṅku pattum bhaṭṭavṛtti 3 kkum purāṇavṛttī-kkum Āka vṛtti 4-kku paṅku 2- m vaidyavṛttikku paṅku 1- m grāmāṅkamāṉa palapaṇi cey vṛttikku paṅku perāl palar pakkalum vilaikoṇṭu mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka bhūdāṉamākavum tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Uḷḷiṭṭa vaiyiṟṟil Ivarkaḷ Iruntup potu mutal karatāṉam Ākavum Aṭaitta Ūrkaḷukku nicca
yitta rūpāy 6 10 2(1/2) Itil mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāy veṟupiṟitta Uṭaiyār tiruppaiññili Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam rūpāy 6 10 6- m tiruveḷḷaṟaiyil nācciyār paṅkayaccelviyār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam rūpāy (1/4) [ 3 pa ¿] Aṭaitta Irāca Irāca vaḷanāṭṭu mel kūṟṟil pāccil kūṟṟattu mel palāṟṟut toṭaiyūr pottakappaṭi rūpāy 6 10 4- li Itil paiṅkaṇi Āṟu Iṭittu Iḻavum nir nilaiyum tiṭarum nattamum Uḷḷiṭṭa rūpāy 4(1/2)
kaṭampantuṟai Uṭaiyārum Uṭaiyār śrī mulasthāṉamuṭaiyārum tevatāṉam kārmaṟu rūpāy (1/2)-m nāyaṉār nupparipperumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kārmaṟu rūpāy (1/4) m Āka rūpāy n=ta nikki rūpāy 5 10 1(1/2) ḍacapu ¿ vitam Āka veṟu piṟinta devapperumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam rūpāy (1/2) pacapu ¿ Āka rūpāy 2 ḍa ma þ rūpāy kki rūpāy 6 10(1/4) Upa capu ¿ þ Itil 10l rūpāy koḷḷum Iṟaiyili Uḷḷur nāyaṉmār Uṭaiyār tirukka
Āka rūpāy 2 10 nta ḍatma Itil ma lam koḷḷum Iṟaiyili Uḷḷur nāyaṉmāril Uṭaiyār maḻavaṉūr Āṇṭār tevatāṉam kārmaṟu rūpāy (1/2)m kariyamāṇikka viṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kārmaṟu makiḻ kūṟṟil maḻavaṉūr pottakappaṭi rūpāy 2 10 vu n=ta pa Itil Ūra mum gopracārabhūmiyum rūpāyn=tanyaman=ta 7ntaḍatma Itil payirceyya Oṇṇāmaiyāl rūpāy 3 li nikki rūpāy 2 10 4 ntaghatva
The entire line is covered over.
ṅkuṭi pottakapaṭi Itil veṟu piṟintu poṉ tiruveḷḷa ṟaiyil nāyaṉār ceyya tāmaraikkaṇṇar tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam rūpāy 6ḍam Iṟai Aṇṇaṉ Akarattu bhaṭṭa rūpāy nya Ü nitmakki rūpāy 3 10 4(1/2)nyacapupa Itilp payiṟceyya Oṇṇāppāḻ rūpāy 5(1/4)ḍa nikki rūpāy 2 10 6(1/4)pacapu ¿ Āka rūpāy 3 10 1(1/2)nyacapu ¿ I nattamum puṉpayirum rūpāy 3(1/4)4tma nikki rūpāy 2 10(1/4)nyatma ¿ Itil
marakkalam koḷḷum Iṟaiyili Uḷḷur nāyaṉār Uṭaiyār tiruppāṟtuṟai Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam kārmaṟu rūpāy (1/2) m nāyaṉār malaikkiṉiyaniṉṟaperumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kārmaṟu rūpāy(1/4)ḍacapu m śrīkaraṇappaḷḷiccantam kārmaṟu rūpāy li Āka rūpāy 4ḍacapu m nāyaṉār malaikkiṉiyaniṉṟaperumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam karatāṉam rūpāy ḍacapum bhaṭṭarkaḷ palarukkum kāṇiyāṉa karatāṉam kārmaṟu rūpāy (1/2)m Āka rūpāy kaḷum nikki rūpāy 2 10 6(1/4)ndhatma ¿ Āka rūpāy 3 10 4(1/2) ndhacapu ¿
m Iṭaiyāṟṟu maṅkalattu sabhaiyār pakkal vilai koṇṭa pramāṇappaṭi rūpāy 2 10 5- liyum natta puṉcey rūpāy n=tapacapu Āka rūpāy 2 10 5 ntapacapu m Āka pottakappaṭi rūpāy (1/4)ndhatma ¿ Itil mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāy veṟu piṟintupoṉa paṟṟum rūpāy 10 1(1/4) þ nikki rūpāy 100000 10000 2 1000ndhatma þ Itil paiṅkaṇi Āṟu Iṭittiḻavum nattamum rūpāy 1(1/2)m (m) Ūr nattam gopr(ā)cara bhuūmiyum rūpāy n=ta mam payir ceyya Oṇṇāppā
ḻ rūpāy 8(1/4)m puṉpayir rūpāy2 10 4(1/4)pamam 10 l 5 koḷḷum Iṟaiyili tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kārmaṟu rūpāy n=tam marakkalaṅ koḷḷum Iṟaiyili rūpāy 2 ḍa- m bhaṭṭarkaḷ kāṇiytevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāy karatāṉam rūpāy-li Āka rūpāy 2 10 2ntatma nikki rūpāy 100 2 10 5tma6 vitam Āka rūpāy 100 4 10 8ndhatva þ Innilaṅkaḷ kārum maṟuvum Oru pūvum kaṭaippūvum vampum kamukum koṭiyum karumpum ceṉṉel ceṅkaḻunir vāḻai Iñci mañcaḷ
Uḷḷiṭṭa tām veṇṭiṉa payir ceytu koḷḷavum Ivaiyiṟṟāl Uḷḷa nel kaṭamai kācu kaṭamai kamuku kaṭamai māvarai puṉpayirk kaṭamai veṭṭi nirāṇi kāverikkulai kāttikaip paccai nattappaccai Eṭuttukkāṭṭum paccai ciṟṟāyam perāyam Āṉaiccā
lai kutiraippanti kuḷattevai varittevai vācal viṉiyokam Olai Eḻuttu Āṟām taccum koṟ kūṭṭilakkai Āḷvari Erivari Iṉavari vācalp paṇam Ūcivāci mukam pārvai Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittu Upātikaḷum samasta prāpti bhūdāna Iṟaiyiliyākavum Ivvūrkaḷil tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam paḷḷiccantam Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟukkavarkaḷ ṭai ppotum
ṭa nattamum gopr(ā)cārabhūmiyum vāstuśeṣamum paṭukaiyum Ivayiṟṟi
Digital edition of SII 24.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
